title: acetosella cineracea
intro: Acetosella cineracea, also known as the cineraria or dusty cineraria, is a type of flowering plant native to the western coast of North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat digestive issues and skin conditions due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Acetosella cineracea include its potential to alleviate symptoms of eczema, acne, and other skin irritations, as well as its ability to support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Acetosella cineracea include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
